key_finding: Cross-model replication SUCCEEDS: Phi accuracy conditioning 4/4 layers p<0.001 (2x STRONGER than Qwen), difficulty conditioning 3/4 layers p=0.004-0.016 (5-6x SMALLER than Qwen). Same qualitative pattern. Functional evidence is architecture-independent.
evidence_impact: New entry #117. Accuracy/difficulty conditioning confirmed on 2nd model family. 7/8 accuracy and 7/8 difficulty tests significant cross-model. Strongest Phase 2 cross-model result.
next_planned: Consolidate cross-model functional evidence table, or investigate Phi's stronger accuracy effect (why V_R(incorrect)≥V_R(correct)?), or test on Mistral.
